description: Whole-well merged telemetry for stage segmentation comparison charts. Recent/custom windows read raw telemetry; all-time reads the precomputed 60-second rollup table. Zoom-specific copy with explicit resolution_mode support for refetch-on-zoom dashboards.
sql: SELECT * FROM (   WITH bounds AS (     SELECT       (:start_time)::timestamp - (:context_minutes || ' minutes')::interval AS start_ts,       (:end_time)::timestamp + (:context_minutes || ' minutes')::interval AS end_ts   ),   scope AS (     SELECT CASE       WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF(CAST(:resolution_mode AS text), ''), '__AUTO__') = 'raw' THEN 'raw'       WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF(CAST(:resolution_mode AS text), ''), '__AUTO__') = 'rollup_60s' THEN 'rollup_60s'       WHEN :data_window = 'all' THEN 'rollup_60s'       ELSE 'raw'     END AS resolution_mode   ),   raw_telemetry AS (     SELECT       CAST(t.name AS TEXT) || ':' || CAST(t.record_ts AS TEXT) AS telemetry_point_id,       t.name AS well_name,       t.record_ts AS ts,       t.rate_slurry,       t.press_mainline,       CASE         WHEN :concentration_feature = 'inline' THEN t.prop_conc_inline         WHEN :concentration_feature = 'target' THEN t.prop_conc_target         WHEN :concentration_feature = 'auger' THEN t.prop_conc_blend_auger         ELSE t.prop_conc_blend_denso       END AS selected_concentration,       1 AS records_in_bucket, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS context_anchor     FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 t     CROSS JOIN bounds b     CROSS JOIN scope sc     WHERE sc.resolution_mode = 'raw'       AND t.name = :well_name       AND t.record_ts >= b.start_ts       AND t.record_ts < b.end_ts   ),   rollup_telemetry AS (     SELECT       CAST(r.name AS TEXT) || ':' || CAST(r.bucket_ts AS TEXT) AS telemetry_point_id,       r.name AS well_name,       r.bucket_ts AS ts,       r.rate_slurry_avg AS rate_slurry,       r.press_mainline_avg AS press_mainline,       CASE         WHEN :concentration_feature = 'inline' THEN r.prop_conc_inline_avg         WHEN :concentration_feature = 'target' THEN r.prop_conc_target_avg         WHEN :concentration_feature = 'auger' THEN r.prop_conc_blend_auger_avg         ELSE r.prop_conc_blend_denso_avg       END AS selected_concentration,       r.records_in_bucket AS records_in_bucket, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS context_anchor     FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_rollup_v1 r     CROSS JOIN bounds b     CROSS JOIN scope sc     WHERE sc.resolution_mode = 'rollup_60s'       AND r.name = :well_name       AND r.bucket_seconds = 60       AND r.bucket_ts >= b.start_ts       AND r.bucket_ts < b.end_ts   ),   td_breaks AS (     SELECT DISTINCT       CAST(stage_end_ts AS timestamp) + INTERVAL '1 millisecond' AS break_ts     FROM featurestore:merged_td_stage_index_v1 s     CROSS JOIN bounds b     WHERE s.name = :well_name       AND s.stage_end_ts IS NOT NULL       AND CAST(s.stage_end_ts AS timestamp) >= b.start_ts       AND CAST(s.stage_end_ts AS timestamp) < b.end_ts   ),   gt_breaks AS (     SELECT DISTINCT       CAST(stage_end_ts AS timestamp) + INTERVAL '1 millisecond' AS break_ts     FROM featurestore:stage_index_v1 s     CROSS JOIN bounds b     WHERE s.name = :well_name       AND s.stage_end_ts IS NOT NULL       AND CAST(s.stage_end_ts AS timestamp) >= b.start_ts       AND CAST(s.stage_end_ts AS timestamp) < b.end_ts   ),   break_points AS (     SELECT break_ts FROM td_breaks     UNION     SELECT break_ts FROM gt_breaks   ),   telemetry AS (     SELECT * FROM raw_telemetry     UNION ALL     SELECT * FROM rollup_telemetry   ),   line_breaks AS (     SELECT       CAST(:well_name AS text) || ':line_break:' || CAST(break_ts AS text) AS telemetry_point_id,       CAST(:well_name AS text) AS well_name,       break_ts AS ts,       CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS rate_slurry,       CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS press_mainline,       CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS selected_concentration,       0 AS records_in_bucket, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS context_anchor FROM break_points ), boundary_points AS (SELECT CAST(:well_name AS text) || ':context_start:' || CAST(b.start_ts AS text) AS telemetry_point_id, CAST(:well_name AS text) AS well_name, b.start_ts AS ts, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS rate_slurry, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS press_mainline, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS selected_concentration, 0 AS records_in_bucket, 0.0 AS context_anchor FROM bounds b UNION ALL SELECT CAST(:well_name AS text) || ':context_end:' || CAST(b.end_ts AS text), CAST(:well_name AS text), b.end_ts, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION), CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION), CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION), 0, 0.0 FROM bounds b) SELECT * FROM telemetry UNION ALL SELECT * FROM line_breaks UNION ALL SELECT * FROM boundary_points ORDER BY well_name, ts, telemetry_point_id ) q
